title: gelasia longiana
intro: Gelasia longiana, also known as "Mountain Balm," is a perennial plant that belongs to the family of plants commonly referred to as the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been shown to have potential in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Gelasia longiana include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce swelling and pain, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties that can help combat infections. Gelasia longiana can be prepared as a herbal tea, salve, or tincture, allowing for various forms of application and consumption to harness its medicinal properties.
